regions.content:
1. 本图为中空100CBX型减速器。 This picture shows the hollow 100CBX reducer.
  2. 减速机速比: (76.3,100.2,124.7,152,214.3,264.6):1。 Reducer speed ratio: (76.3,100.2,124.7,152,214.3,264.6):1.
  3. 润滑油脂: VIGO GREASE RE0或RE-00 (MOLYWHITE)。 Grease: VIGO GREASE RE0 or RE-00 (MOLYWHITE).
  4. 额定输出扭矩: 980N.m (输出转速: 15R/Min)。 Rated output torque: 980N.m (output speed: 15R / Min).
